mapper.select:
select * from ysdi_web_db.case where isShow = 1
and categoryID = #{categoryID}
and title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
order by sortID, updateTime desc
mapper.update: update ysdi_web_db.case set title = #{title}, categoryID = #{categoryID},categoryName=#{categoryName}, subTitle = #{subTitle}, img = #{img}, zhaiyao=#{zhaiyao}, content = #{content}, mbcontent = #{mbcontent},sortID = #{sortID}, SEOTitle = #{SEOTitle}, SEOKeywords = #{SEOKeywords}, SEODescription = #{SEODescription}, updateTime = #{updateTime} where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into ysdi_web_db.case (title, categoryID, categoryName, subTitle, img, zhaiyao,content, mbcontent, sortID, SEOTitle, SEOKeywords, SEODescription,addTime, updateTime) values (#{title}, #{categoryID},#{categoryName}, #{subTitle}, #{img},#{zhaiyao}, #{content}, #{mbcontent}, #{sortID}, #{SEOTitle}, #{SEOKeywords}, #{SEODescription}, #{addTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update:
update ysdi_web_db.case set isShow = 0 where id IN
#{id}
